items.title: Why Amgen (AMGN) is a Top Value Stock for the Long-Term
items.description: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.

items.title: Ollin debuts with $100M and plans to challenge top-selling eye drugs
items.description: Backed by a trio of top venture firms, Ollin is working on a pair of medicines it believes can one-up Roche’s Vabysmo and Amgen’s Tepezza.
